title: Chur、Graubünden — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Chur、Graubündenの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

ChurはGraubündenにある人口37,000の都市です。Switzerland’s oldest city and capital of the Graubünden canton, a gateway to the Alps with a well-preserved old town and the starting point of the Glacier Express.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
